decisions.rationale: The observation's base_record_id corridor_first-second-avenues-brt already exists in the registry with matching corridor name (First & Second Avenues), borough (Manhattan), and consistent limits (South Ferry to 125th Street per evidence quote). No different registry record refers to this same combined corridor; the observation already resolves to its own record.

decisions.rationale: The observation's base_record_id corridor_first-avenue-manhattan-2010 already exists in the registry with matching corridor name (First Avenue), limits (Houston Street to 125th Street), and borough (Manhattan). This is a distinct single-avenue corridor that is a component of the combined First/Second Avenues corridor — not the same real-world entity as the combined corridor. No different registry record refers to this same single-avenue entity.
